brand.name: Northbean
brand.tagline: Premium small-batch cold brew for people who take their mornings seriously.
brand.mission: Make exceptional cold brew accessible to people who care about quality but don't have time to make it themselves.

sample_phrases: Single-origin Ethiopian Yirgacheffe with notes of bergamot and dark chocolate.
Brewed Tuesday, on your doorstep Friday.
The best coffee shop is the one in your kitchen.
avoid_phrases: Wake up and seize the day!

meta.notes: Caption-first storytelling, assume sound off. First 3 seconds must show product or brewing process. Cream and Espresso lead, Copper for CTA only.

tiktok_reels.notes: Native-feeling content (handheld, real, unpolished). Show the brewing or pour, not the lifestyle. On-screen captions with our typography.

google_display.notes: Headline + product shot + CTA, no clutter. Cream background with Espresso headline, Copper CTA.
